# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    environment: production

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
        tier: frontend
        environment: production
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - web-application
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: web-application
        image: web-application:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "production"
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          value: "info"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 1Gi
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 2
        volumeMounts:
        - name: app-config
          mountPath: /config
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: app-config
        configMap:
          name: web-application-config

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-application-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  sessionAffinity: ClientIP
  sessionAffinityConfig:
    clientIP:
      timeoutSeconds: 10800

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
        environment: production
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - memcached
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6-alpine
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        ports:
        - name: memcached
          containerPort: 11211
          protocol: TCP
        args:
        - "-m"
        - "512"
        - "-c"
        - "1024"
        - "-I"
        - "4m"
        - "-v"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 250m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 11211
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 11211
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 2
          failureThreshold: 2

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
  ports:
  - name: memcached
    port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
    protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    tier: backend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 5
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 2
      maxUnavailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
      tier: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
        tier: backend
        environment: production
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - background-workers
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: background-workers:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        env:
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "production"
        - name: WORKER_CONCURRENCY
          value: "10"
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          value: "info"
        - name: QUEUE_NAME
          value: "production-queue"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 800m
            memory: 1Gi
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - pgrep -f worker
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 15
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - pgrep -f worker
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 2
        volumeMounts:
        - name: worker-config
          mountPath: /config
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: worker-config
        configMap:
          name: background-workers-config

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: web-application-config
  namespace: production
data:
  app.conf: |
    server {
      port: 8080
      timeout: 30
    }
    cache {
      enabled: true
      ttl: 3600
    }

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: background-workers-config
  namespace: production
data:
  worker.conf: |
    concurrency: 10
    retry_attempts: 3
    retry_delay: 5
    timeout: 300

---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: web-application-hpa
  namespace: production
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: web-application
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 70
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: memory
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 80

---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: background-workers-hpa
  namespace: production
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: background-workers
  minReplicas: 5
  maxReplicas: 20
  metrics:
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 75
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: memory
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 80

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: web-application-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: memcached-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: background-workers-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
      tier: backend
